title: warm flaky brunch portuguese tomato bake
description: A resinous, flaky brunch-mood portuguese dish featuring tomato ketchup. Perfect for a hot stone plate.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: chilled and cut into small pieces

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chilled butter to the dry ingredients and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the flour until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the milk and eggs to the bowl and stir the mixture until it forms a shaggy dough.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead it a few times until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Roll the dough out to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a hot stone plate or baking sheet.
Spread the crushed tomatoes over the center of the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Drizzle the tomato ketchup over the tomatoes and sprinkle with minced onion and minced garlic.
Fold the edges of the dough up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake the tart in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
Remove the tart from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
